description: Returns the person the camera is focused on. If you need the vehicle, see [[cameraOn]].
examples:
<sqf>
if (isNull player) exitWith { /* no player */ };

if (player == focusOn) then
{
	hint "You are controlling your player unit";
}
else
{
	hint "You are remote-controlling a unit";
};
</sqf>
name: focusOn

ret.desc: controlled person or [[objNull]] if no unit is controlled
